channel.title: Kennebec County Probate Court
channel.description: No probate-specific news/RSS feed exists at any of the 16 counties; monitored by full-page fingerprint of the official probate court page. Most actively updated of the 16 pages found: lists an 'Administrative Weeks' closure schedule and recent fee-change notices.

item.title: Page updated: Kennebec County Probate Court
item.description:
This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update.
What changed (text excerpt): Removed: - County offices will be closed Friday, July 3 - rd - in observance of Independence Day
